            375.Speaker 0: Well, let me know when you find one. Priestess Gut's better at causing pain than curing it.

                                        451.Speaker 0: Guess it don't matter what you are. You're a True Soul. And that's good enough for me.note: <placeholder>DragonbornGithyankiDrowHalfling

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        ruletagtype rule

                                        • Drow {a672ac1d-d088-451a-9537-3da4bf74466c}

                                        Text

                                        Variant 1

                                        combine=0
                                        • Dragonborn
                                        • Githyanki
                                        Guess it don't matter what you are. You're a True Soul. And that's good enough for me.

                                        combine=0
                                        • Drow

                                                  298.Speaker 0: Guess you're a thick one, so I'll tell it straight: we're gonna make the carcass talk.

                                                          397.Narrator: *You feel Shadowheart's anxiety. The weapon the Absolute seeks - it's the artefact that she carries. The same one that protected you as you entered the goblin camp.*note: Shadowheart steals a glance to Tav, her expression tight, apprehensive. The image of her undulates slightly - a mindmeld.Shadowheart

                                                            283.Narrator: *Her mind focuses - their suspicion cannot be aroused. They cannot discover that the weapon they seek is within their grasp.*note: Shadowheart's eyes flick over to Dror Ragzlin.

                                                                                                                                                                        218.Speaker 0: You - get to the grove. Help the drow Minthara kill the lot.

                                                                                                                                                                      387.Speaker 0: Like I said - I got plans for you. Report to the drow. Minthara's the name.6584fb1a-7ca9-950f-40a6-be0cfdd296f7_plans

                                                                                                                                                                                440.Player: I serve the ancient provenance of nature itself, not your pathetic god. Oath of the AncientsOath of DevotionOath of Vengeance7efcadc0-9e88-4d0a-87b9-64a589e2df91Paladin

                                                                                                                                                                                Flags and Tags

                                                                                                                                                                                ruletagtype rule
                                                                                                                                                                                • Oath of the Ancients {7c89622b-4194-41df-b2ff-145a5056ee49}
                                                                                                                                                                                • Oath of Devotion {2de0a4fc-5831-4439-94d3-a7ff9b7aacf6}
                                                                                                                                                                                • Oath of Vengeance {a1aa47b2-4d0a-4c97-931b-2c53353d5b23}
                                                                                                                                                                                • 7efcadc0-9e88-4d0a-87b9-64a589e2df91
                                                                                                                                                                                checktype Tag | speaker 2 Player
                                                                                                                                                                                • Paladin {6d85ab2d-5c23-498c-a61e-98f05a00177a} = True

                                                                                                                                                                                Text

                                                                                                                                                                                Variant 1

                                                                                                                                                                                combine=0
                                                                                                                                                                                • Oath of the Ancients
                                                                                                                                                                                I serve the ancient provenance of nature itself, not your pathetic god.
                                                                                                                                                                                h7ea73fccg4e74g4de1ga231gb2b5fc6114a5 | 9cd62244-94e9-4705-898e-fa80a9be3d3a | stub

                                                                                                                                                                                Variant 2

                                                                                                                                                                                combine=0
                                                                                                                                                                                • Oath of Devotion
                                                                                                                                                                                I am no devotee of the Absolute. My oath, not some evil god, is my bond.
                                                                                                                                                                                h13ec83f5g9970g4ebcga54dg4fb133ed4b8f | afc52696-3d77-4e24-8ebf-c46c41ccf1e9 | stub

                                                                                                                                                                                Variant 3

                                                                                                                                                                                combine=0
                                                                                                                                                                                • Oath of Vengeance
                                                                                                                                                                                My oath is to take vengeance, not orders from some cultist god.
                                                                                                                                                                                h2c4b092eg3ba5g4fccg962eg06675433865e | 639af61c-490f-4d93-b75b-39ab2d331d31 | stub

                                                                                                                                                                                Variant 4

                                                                                                                                                                                combine=0
                                                                                                                                                                                • 7efcadc0-9e88-4d0a-87b9-64a589e2df91
                                                                                                                                                                                My oath is to the rule of law. Not even the Absolute is above the law.
                                                                                                                                                                                h5b132489g1198g45d6ga798g067ac2629075 | 9f3e0679-1ecf-42b4-89b5-daf25e32baf7 | stub

                                                                                                                                                        142.Speaker 0: Yeah, yeah - you're right. You're a real True Soul. I felt it.

                                                                                      Text

                                                                                      Variant 1

                                                                                      combine=0
                                                                                      • Oath of Vengeance
                                                                                      I speak for the souls your evil god has slain - and I say they are due their revenge.
                                                                                      h0e4f9c62gc790g4ff5gae2ega55834e8f84f | 6c5e7e92-a05a-4f4b-8626-d3de5dc96638 | stub

                                                                                      Variant 2

                                                                                      combine=0
                                                                                      • Oath of Devotion
                                                                                      I speak for the virtues sacred and pure - and I say you die here, monster.
                                                                                      h28acec61ge821g4c34g96fage409201382a4 | a4600f9d-ca53-463e-922b-168a1764438e | stub

                                                                                      Variant 3

                                                                                      combine=0
                                                                                      • Oath of the Ancients
                                                                                      I speak for the untamed wild - and I say enough. This ends here.
                                                                                      h983fa355g719eg494bg99e9g87ccd97cf1f1 | 17c1e900-eac1-425a-a1d1-e3aeb6d79e6c | stub

                                                                                      Variant 4

                                                                                      combine=0
                                                                                      • 7efcadc0-9e88-4d0a-87b9-64a589e2df91
                                                                                      I speak for justice, and you will be silenced.
                                                                                      he3350826g8b1dg4372g9cf2g30c8a61012dd | c5cade83-a027-4239-a7c0-4e05319d0250 | stub
